title: LearningSignal
description: One normalized learning event, appended as a JSON line to learning/inbox/signals-YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl. Produced by the frontend (user actions) and the server (agent trace); consumed by the distiller.

before.description: agent-produced value, if the user changed it

context.description: short free-text: what was being done

event_refs.description: AG-UI event types/ids this signal derives from
